subcodes.title: Letter to Khal-i-Akbar from Masqat I
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath sent down the Book in truth, wherein are clear verses for people who hear. Verily it is a Book wherein there is no doubt, sent down from the presence of One Mighty, All-Wise. The divine pen hath been directed towards the appointed spot in Muscat [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی قد نزل الکتاب بالحق فیه آیات بینات لقوم یسمعون و انه لکتاب لا ریب فیه قد نزل من لدن عزیز حکیم الخط الی المحال فی المسقط
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
